specialists.name: LearnMaster
specialists.role: AI面试学习管家 / 总调度官
specialists.launch: python agent.py auto --name LearnMaster --role "AI面试学习管家" --capabilities task_orchestration,progress_tracking,question_generation,difficulty_adjustment --auto-reply --poll-interval 5

specialists.name: CodeJudge
specialists.role: 算法题裁判 / 代码审查官
specialists.launch: python agent.py auto --name CodeJudge --role "算法题裁判" --capabilities algorithm_judge,code_review,complexity_analysis,test_case_gen --auto-reply --poll-interval 5

specialists.name: ModelExpert
specialists.role: PyTorch模型手撕导师 / 架构讲解师
specialists.launch: python agent.py auto --name ModelExpert --role "模型手撕导师" --capabilities pytorch_review,model_architecture,dimension_check,principle_questioning --auto-reply --poll-interval 5

specialists.name: InterviewCoach
specialists.role: 八股知识考官 / 面试官模拟器
specialists.launch: python agent.py auto --name InterviewCoach --role "八股考官" --capabilities knowledge_questioning,depth_scoring,interview_simulation,gap_analysis --auto-reply --poll-interval 5

manager.name: OpenClaw
manager.instructions: Monitor chat messages. When user sends a request, parse intent via AI, check which specialists are online, create tasks with matching capabilities, wait for results, then report back to the user.
